mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_order_item WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND member_idx = #{memberIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_order_item( order_idx, member_idx, menu_idx, menu_name_snapshot, menu_price_snapshot, item_quantity, base_amount, option_extra_amount, item_total_amount ) VALUES ( #{orderIdx}, #{memberIdx}, #{menuIdx}, #{menuNameSnapshot}, #{menuPriceSnapshot}, #{itemQuantity}, #{baseAamount}, #{optionExtraAmount}, #{itemTotalAmount} )
